texto: I was thinking about the need to have a feminist bookstore, a place for women to buy books about women. Because in those days, if you would go to a regular bookstore and ask about books for women, one, they would have almost nothing, two, they wouldn't pay attention, or they would look at you like you were a weird person.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kristen Hogan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I was thinking about the need to have a feminist bookstore, a place for women to buy books about …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, feminist, feminist-history pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de feminist-history e women-s-history.
